name: Greek-Style Shrimp Cocktail

ingredients.item: (20- to 30-count) wild shrimp, peeled and deveined
finely chopped fresh Greek oregano or dill
In a large pot over high heat, bring 8 cups of water to a boil.
Add the shrimp and boil for 2 to 3 minutes, until pink. Drain and cool.
In a food processor, combine the egg, oregano, olives, garlic, and mustard. Blend to combine.
with the processor running on low speed, very gradually add the walnut oil through the feed tube on your food processor.
When it has thickened to a mayonnaise-like texture, blend in the salt and pepper. Serve immediately with the shrimp, or use within 1 day.
